source.multipart_basis: Decomposition inferred from the original prompt; no rulebook citations added beyond those carried by the original sample.

full_prompt: Design one representative India Mark II deep-well handpump cylinder + pump-rod column assembly compliant with the Rural Water Supply Network (RWSN) / Skat India Mark II specification (2022). The pump operates at a nominal static head of 45 m (maximum design head), with a cylinder bore of 63.5 mm (2.5 inch), plunger stroke of 125 mm, delivering approximately 12-18 L/min at the handle rate of 40 strokes/min. The India Mk II is inherently a multi-part assembly and cannot be modeled as one solid body: it must be delivered as a STEP AP242 multi-body containing the following part families. (A) cylinder body: seamless brass-lined (or stainless-lined) cast-iron tube 63.5 mm bore, 65 mm ID of liner, 85 mm OD overall, 450 mm long, threaded to the rising main above and the footvalve shoe below. (B) plunger assembly: plunger body + leather or nitrile cup, translating within the cylinder under rod-drive. (C) footvalve: check valve at the cylinder bottom; flap or poppet plus seat. (D) upper check valve at plunger head. (E) pump rod segment: 12 mm diameter carbon-steel rod (AISI 1018, fy = 235 MPa, UTS = 370 MPa) in 3 m lengths; for 45 m head, 15 segments are required; threaded at both ends. (F) rod hex coupling: joins adjacent rod segments; carbon-steel hex nut coupling over threaded rod ends. (G) rising main pipe: 32 mm GI pipe supplying the lift column above the cylinder; delivered as a short representative segment with one end threaded into the cylinder top. Design axial rod load is the sum of (a) weight of water column in cylinder lifted per stroke = rho_w * g * h * A_bore = 1000 * 9.81 * 45 * pi/4 * 0.0635^2 = 1398 N per stroke, plus (b) weight of rod string itself (12 mm x 45 m x 7850 kg/m3 * 9.81 = 404 N), plus (c) dynamic inertia factor 1.3, giving design axial rod load ~2340 N at the top of the column. Rod must not buckle in the upstroke (rod in tension) or fail in compression of the rising main guide during downstroke. Corrosion allowance 0.5 mm on steel rod diameter per Mk II corrosion-service annex. Deliverable is a CAD multi-body assembly of cylinder body, plunger, footvalve, upper check valve, at least one 3 m rod segment with hex coupling, and the interface to the 32 mm rising main, with each instance tagged with part_family and instance_index. Linear static structural FEA on the assembled model verifies the rod under 2340 N and the cylinder body under internal pressure 441 kPa (45 m water head). Vibration, thermal, fluid, radiation analyses are NOT required. Buckling check on the long rod IS required because the 45 m rod column has a very high slenderness ratio; it may be evaluated on the rod + coupling sub-assembly. FEM pass/fail is set on the assembled model; per-part stress is reported.
short_prompt:
Design the cylinder + piston-rod subassembly of an RWSN/Skat India Mk II handpump (2022 specification) as a multi-part assembly. Pumping head 45 m; cylinder bore 63.5 mm; stroke 125 mm; piston rod 12 mm diameter AISI 1018 (fy 235 MPa).

Load cases: LC1 upstroke rod tension 2340 N + 441 kPa internal pressure; LC2 downstroke rod compression; LC3 side impact at rod midspan.

Pass/fail: rod stress <= fy / SF; rod buckling SF >= 2.5; corrosion allowance 0.5 mm; FEM at assembled level; threaded joint DCR <= 1.0.

prompt.title: India Mk II deep-well pump cylinder + rod assembly (multi-part assembly)
prompt.brief: Multi-part India Mk II deep-well handpump column: brass-lined cylinder body + plunger + footvalve + upper check valve + 15 rod segments + hex couplings + rising-main interface, sized for 45 m static head and 63.5 mm bore per RWSN / Skat spec. 2340 N axial rod load with long-rod buckling SF 2.5. FEM pass/fail is set on the assembled model.

parts.name: cylinder_body
parts.role: brass-lined cast-iron cylinder tube; houses the plunger and threads into rising main above and footvalve shoe below
parts.material_hint: brass-lined cast iron (or stainless-lined) per Mk II spec

parts.name: plunger_assembly
parts.role: translating plunger body with leather / nitrile cup that rides inside the cylinder liner; carries the upper check valve

geometric_constraints.cup_material: leather or nitrile per Mk II spec

parts.material_hint: brass / stainless body with elastomer cup

parts.name: footvalve
parts.role: bottom check valve preventing water column backflow into the well during downstroke

geometric_constraints.typical_construction: flap or poppet against brass seat

parts.name: upper_check_valve
parts.role: upper one-way valve located at the plunger head; opens on upstroke, seals on downstroke
parts.material_hint: brass or stainless body + elastomer disc

parts.name: pump_rod_segment
parts.role: 12 mm diameter steel rod segment 3 m long; stacked to reach 45 m head; tensile + compressive load path from handle to plunger
parts.material_hint: AISI 1018 mild steel, yield 235 MPa, UTS 370 MPa, E 200 GPa

parts.name: rod_hex_coupling
parts.role: hex coupling joining adjacent rod segments via matching external threads

geometric_constraints.count_note: 15 rod segments connected by 14 couplings between them

parts.name: rising_main_segment
parts.role: representative segment of 32 mm GI pipe above the cylinder, threaded into the cylinder top

assembly_envelope.coordinate_system: z = vertical lift axis; representative segment shows cylinder + one 3 m rod + coupling + rising-main stub (full 45 m column not emitted)

load_cases.name: axial_rod_design
load_cases.derivation: water column + rod weight + 1.3 dynamic factor

boundary_conditions.cylinder_ends: threaded to rising main (G) above and footvalve (C) below
boundary_conditions.rod_couplings: threaded coupling (F) tying adjacent rod segments; model as tied continuous axial + moment

objective.primary: pass structural + buckling checks on the assembled column

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: long-rod buckling SF for deep-well handpump service
multipart acceptance is set on the assembled FEA; per-part stress is reported but not gated

interfaces.load_path: water column weight + reaction into footvalve seat at cylinder bottom
cylinder weight + pressure reaction into rising main above

interfaces.mediated_by: seated/screwed (upper check valve seats on plunger head)
interfaces.load_path: uplift water pressure into plunger during upstroke

interfaces.mediated_by: threaded (bottom rod end into plunger body)
interfaces.load_path: delivers handle stroke force into plunger

fem_check_policy.rationale: Multipart entries are verified on the assembled model. Per-part stress is reported but does not gate pass/fail.

notes.why_multi_part: The India Mk II pump is a standardized assembly of screwed and threaded components (cylinder, plunger with check, footvalve, many 3 m rod segments with hex couplings, rising main). The 45 m rod column physically cannot be a single part; the spec mandates 3 m segments with couplings.
notes.speculation_caveats: Rod-segment count (15) and coupling count (14) are computed from the 45 m head and 3 m segment length stated in the original; plunger cup material, specific valve construction, and hex size are inferred per common Mk II practice.
